design_philosophy: Layered darkness with selective neon illumination. High-end, premium sci-fi aesthetic. Pure black is avoided in favor of deep space blue-gray to create depth. Focus on 2.5D puzzle platformer clarity in landscape mode.

hud_timer.usage: 10.00s countdown on HUD. Must use tabular numbers or fixed widths for stability.

headings.usage: Main menu, Level Select numbers, Pause menu titles.

body.usage: Settings text, hints, secondary UI text.

hud_layout_landscape.safe_areas: MANDATORY: Wrap HUD in SafeAreaView. Leave minimum 32px padding from left/right edges to avoid notches/bezels.
hud_layout_landscape.top_center: Timer (e.g., 10.00s). Largest HUD element. Orbitron font. Glows Cyan, pulses Red when under 3 seconds.
hud_layout_landscape.top_left: Echo Counter (Robot Head Icon + x2/3) and Pause Button.
hud_layout_landscape.top_right: Restart Level Button (Circular icon with counter-clockwise arrow).

touch_controls.left_zone: Bottom-left 40% of screen. Visualized by Left/Right D-Pad arrows. Opacity 30%.
touch_controls.right_zone: Bottom-right 40% of screen. Visualized by massive Jump button (^). Opacity 30%.

screen_layouts.main_menu: Centered layout. Enormous 'Time Loop Escape' logo. Vertical stack of buttons: Play, Level Select, Settings. Anchored at bottom right: Rewarded Ad / Remove Ads (Stubbed).
screen_layouts.level_select: Grid layout (flex-row, flex-wrap). Square level nodes. Locked nodes are dimmed (#161824) with a lock icon. Unlocked nodes have a cyan border and 1-3 success green stars below them.
screen_layouts.pause_overlay: Absolute fill backdrop blur. Centered vertical menu: Resume, Settings, Quit to Menu. Dark elevated panel with neon cyan border.
screen_layouts.level_complete: Slide-in panel. Large S/A/B/C Grade stamp. Star pop-in animation. Next Level and Retry buttons side-by-side.
screen_layouts.settings: Simple panel. Audio toggles (SFX/Music), Controls layout (Adjust touch zones), Accessibility (High contrast mode).

gameplay_visual_specs.robot_character: Cute futuristic robot. White chassis, rounded silhouette (like Eve from Wall-E). Large visor that glows neon cyan (#00E5FF).
gameplay_visual_specs.echo_ghost: Previous actions clone. Rendered at 50% opacity, tinted entirely in neon purple (#9D00FF) using Skia ColorMatrix. Leaves a subtle purple particle trail.
gameplay_visual_specs.environment_tiles: Sci-fi laboratory. Dark metal grates and platforms (#161824). Edges of platforms have a 1px cyan highlight to define collision boundaries.

hazards_and_interactables.lasers: Solid white core (2px) with heavy neon red Skia blur (8px).
hazards_and_interactables.pressure_plates: Flat switches that glow cyan when unpressed, green when pressed.
hazards_and_interactables.doors: Energy gates that dissolve (opacity fade + particles) when unlocked.

skia_effects.soft_bloom: Use @shopify/react-native-skia Blur filters underneath text and lasers.
skia_effects.time_rewind: When timer hits 0, trigger a chromatic aberration shader (split RGB) and scale effect, rewind positions quickly, then resume.
skia_effects.particles: Neon cyan dust floating in the background, rendering using Skia points.

background_tunnel.description: Blue neon hex tunnel. Great for Main Menu background or parallax.

robot_reference.description: White humanoid robot with glowing blue lights.

portal_effect.description: Purple spiral portal effect. Good reference for spawn/exit doors.

testing_attributes.rule: All interactive elements must use BOTH 'testID' and 'data-testid' attributes (for React Native and Web compat).

instructions_to_main_agent: Lock app orientation to landscape (via app.json).
Use @shopify/react-native-skia for the 2.5D game world and soft bloom rendering.
Do NOT use Shadcn UI or HTML tags (div, span). This is a React Native app. Use View, Text, StyleSheet, Pressable.
Manage the 10s Timer + Echo rewinding system using requestAnimationFrame and a deterministic state array.
Implement custom buttons using Pressable with scale animations instead of standard Button components.
